case_title: MALLOY, MARGARET VS MILLER, ORWIN DBA CARIBBEAN GARDENS NIGHT CLUB & R et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALLOY, MARGARET PETITION MAILED ON NOV 20, 1996
PROOF OF SERVICE ON ORWIN MILLER DBA CARIBBEAN GARDENS NIGHT CLUB.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLER, ORWIN DBA CARIBBEAN GARDENS NIGHT CLUB & R HEARING SET FOR FEB-26-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MALLOY, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, ORWIN DBA CARIBBEAN GARDENS NIGHT CLUB & R CICERO, DERICK DBA CARIBBEAN GARDENS NIGHTCLUB & R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLOY, MARGARET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, ORWIN DBA CARIBBEAN GARDENS NIGHT CLUB & R CICERO, DERICK DBA CARIBBEAN GARDENS NIGHTCLUB & R $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,065.00, DISMISS AS TO CICERO, DERICK DBA CARIBBEAN GARDEN NIGHTCLUB & RESTAURANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,750.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $172.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $14.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, ORWIN DBA CARIBBEAN GARDENS NIGHT CLUB & R
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF FEB-26-1996, GRANTED
